race.description: Lake Wallace Hotel After The Last 0-56 Handicap
race.comment: SHE FLYS (5) has been busting to win and last time there was less than 2L in it at Horsham over this distance. Races forward and gets her chance in this line-up. SHARMA PRINCESS (7) tends to mix the form but has the ability and come back 250m from a solid effort at Horsham. Has a 1.5kg claim today and can get into the finish. ALBLAZER (10) was terrible at Gawler (vet Cleared) over longer but has pieces of form that stack up. He maps well and has won this course/distance. CRACKERJACK HATCH (4) was a strong Geelong Maiden winner three back and may appreciate the step-up in trip. Keep onside.
